violations.text: Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
The entrance door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025
The receptacle in the restroom is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2025
